picks.title: SJSU Opera Theatre presents a Double Bill: La Voix Humaine and Stuck Elevator at Hammer Theatre Center
picks.why: A darkly comedic opera about a deliveryman trapped in an elevator—wildly original and free at SJSU.

picks.title: Spring Dance Festival 2026
picks.why: Two days of live dance performances by Santa Clara students; rare chance to see emerging local choreography.

picks.title: San Francisco Shakespeare Festival Presents Julius Caesar
picks.why: Shakespeare's Julius Caesar performed live by the SF Shakespeare Festival—professional theater, free admission in Cupertino.
